zh-cn.com_touch_head_begin_1: $doer.firstname$伸出手，轻轻地拍了拍$receiver.firstname$的头以示鼓励。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_begin_2: $doer.firstname$脸上带着微笑，亲昵地抬手揉了揉$receiver.firstname$的头发
zh-cn.com_touch_head_begin_3: $doer.firstname$忍不住抬手轻轻地摸了摸$receiver.firstname$的头。

en-us.com_touch_head_begin_1: $doer.firstname$ reached out and gently patted $receiver.firstname$'s head to show encouragement.
en-us.com_touch_head_begin_2: $doer.firstname$'s face was filled with a smile, raised their hand and affectionately ruffled $receiver.firstname$'s hair
en-us.com_touch_head_begin_3: $doer.firstname$ couldn't help but raise their hand to gently touch $receiver.firstname$'s head.
